// About Me

Who I Am

[ IDENTITY VERIFIED ]

I'm a veteran cloud security professional with 20+ years of IT and cybersecurity experience, specializing in AWS, Azure, Microsoft XDR, and enterprise‑scale security architecture. I lead multi‑cloud security initiatives, large‑scale cloud migrations, SIEM modernization, automation‑driven operations, and full‑spectrum enterprise architecture efforts.

Beyond cloud, I run cyber assessments, architect end‑to‑end enterprise security solutions, and CTF, cyber‑range training to strengthen organizational readiness. With certifications including CISSP, CISM, and multiple AWS/Azure credentials, I deliver resilient architectures, cross‑functional alignment, and measurable security outcomes.

I'm driven by proactive security on every control, configuration, and log source matters when defending critical systems.

// Professional Experience

Career Timeline

20+ years defending critical systems and leading cyber operations

Security Engineer / Cloud Architect
CACI
Apr 2024 – Present
  • Spearheaded the design and deployment of advanced threat-detection architectures across Azure and AWS, accelerating early threat identification and strengthening organizational security posture.
  • Partnered with cross-functional engineering and executive teams to overhaul incident-response protocols, reducing response times by 30% through optimized KQL-driven detection logic and Sentinel workbooks.
  • Deployed machine-learning analytics to enhance detection accuracy, significantly reducing false positives and enabling security teams to prioritize genuine threats.
  • Applied deep understanding of network security, IAM, data protection, and encryption to architect secure, resilient cloud environments.
  • Utilized Tanium and Microsoft Defender for Endpoint to maintain real-time endpoint visibility, enforce compliance, and accelerate threat remediation across enterprise assets.
Senior Technical Planner / Cyber Lead
SAIC
Jan 2023 – Apr 2024
  • Led a team of cyber analysts and engineers to implement enterprise security solutions across the Army Cyber Protection Brigade, improving organizational security compliance by 25%.
  • Assessed and streamlined AWS cloud infrastructure, boosting operational efficiency by 100% while reducing costs by 50% through architectural optimization.
  • Engineered Python-based automation and Docker-containerized solutions on AWS, improving performance in cyber exercise environments by 75%.
  • Conducted threat modeling and gap analyses to identify vulnerabilities, driving remediation efforts aligned with DoD cybersecurity standards.
  • Leveraged enterprise security tools including Palo Alto, CrowdStrike, and Splunk to monitor, detect, and respond to threats across complex network environments.
Information Security Manager
USDA – National Bio and Agro-Defense Facility
Apr 2019 – Jan 2023
  • Served as the primary cybersecurity advisor for NBAF, providing expert guidance on SOC operations, security architecture, and risk management.
  • Designed and deployed layered defense-in-depth strategies to protect Industrial Control Systems and IoT assets, cutting incident response time by 50%.
  • Operated Tenable for continuous vulnerability scanning and managed Elasticsearch and Security Onion for log analysis, network monitoring, and threat hunting.
  • Directed comprehensive Risk Management Framework (RMF) operations and delivered targeted security awareness training for over 400 personnel.
  • Developed robust disaster recovery and business continuity plans aligned with NIST 800-53 and organizational compliance requirements.
Cyber Assessor / Cyber Lead
United States Army Reserve
Apr 2006 – Present
  • Led enterprise-scale cyber range exercises in collaboration with Army Reserve forces, enhancing cybersecurity readiness by 95% through strategic simulations.
  • Utilized Terraform and GitLab CI/CD pipelines to automate range deployments, increasing deployment efficiency by 50%.
  • Conducted comprehensive evaluations of security controls, improving compliance with DoD cybersecurity standards by 75%.
  • Extensively utilized Palo Alto, CrowdStrike, Splunk, Elasticsearch, Security Onion, Tenable, AWS, and Azure to conduct assessments and monitor threats.
Cybersecurity Analyst
U.S. Department of Defense
2016 – 2019
  • Supported the successful execution of the Command Cyber Readiness Inspection (CCRI), ensuring compliance with stringent DoD cybersecurity benchmarks.
  • Maintained continuous intrusion detection and delivered rapid incident response, reducing response time by 25%.
  • Leveraged Tanium for endpoint management, Elasticsearch for centralized log analysis, and Tenable for vulnerability assessments across DoD networks.
  • Transformed complex cyber telemetry into actionable visual dashboards, enabling data-driven decision-making for senior stakeholders.

// GitHub Projects

Open Source Portfolio

Cybersecurity, cloud, and analytics projects on GitHub

PYTHON · AWS
AWS CloudTrail Analytics
Python scripts to ingest, parse, and analyze AWS CloudTrail logs within Elastic SIEM for audit and threat detection.
→ opsec12/ElasticPython/tree/main/AWS_CloudTrail
PYTHON · AWS
AWS IAM Analyzer
Automated analysis of AWS IAM policies to detect over-permissive roles, privilege escalation paths, and policy misconfigurations.
→ opsec12/ElasticPython/tree/main/AWS_IAM
PYTHON · ELASTIC
Cyber Event Correlation
Multi-source event correlation engine that maps events to MITRE ATT&CK techniques using Elasticsearch as the backend.
→ opsec12/ElasticPython/tree/main/Cyber_Event_Correlation
PYTHON · ELASTIC
Cyber Network Analyzer
Real-time network traffic analysis tool for pcap parsing, flow extraction, and anomaly flagging with Elastic integration.
→ opsec12/ElasticPython/tree/main/Cyber_Network_Analyzer
PYTHON · CTI
Cyber Threat Intel
Threat intelligence aggregator that pulls IOCs from multiple feeds, enriches indicators, and pushes results into Elastic SIEM.
→ opsec12/ElasticPython/tree/main/Cyber_Threat_Intel
PYTHON · DEFENDER
Microsoft Defender Automation
Python tooling to automate Microsoft Defender alert triage, incident enrichment, and response actions via Graph API.
→ opsec12/ElasticPython/tree/main/Microsoft%20Defender
PYTHON · SENTINEL
Microsoft Sentinel Automation
Automation scripts for Microsoft Sentinel — analytic rule management, watchlist updates, and playbook triggering via REST API.
→ opsec12/ElasticPython/tree/main/Microsoft_Sentinel
PYTHON · ML
Project Neural
Neural network experiments applied to cybersecurity datasets for malware classification and anomaly detection.
→ opsec12/ElasticPython/tree/main/Project_Neural
PYTHON · ML
Sensor Anomaly Detection
Unsupervised anomaly detection on sensor/telemetry data using Isolation Forest and statistical models, backed by Elastic.
→ opsec12/ElasticPython/tree/main/Sensor_Anomalies
PYTHON · ANALYTICS
Simple Event Timeline
Lightweight event timeline builder that ingests log data and renders chronological attack timelines from Elastic query results.
→ opsec12/ElasticPython/tree/main/Simple_Event_Timeline
KQL · SENTINEL
Sentinel KQL Queries
Production KQL detection rules, hunting queries, and workbook queries for Microsoft Sentinel — organized by MITRE tactic.
→ opsec12/KQL_Ninja/tree/main/SentinelKQL
PYTHON · SECURITY
Cyber Summit 2023
Repository from the U.S. Army Reserve Cyber Protection Brigade sessions at Cyber Summit 2023 — tools, scripts, and resources.
→ opsec12/CS23
KQL · ELASTIC
Elastic KQL Queries
Curated KQL detection and hunting queries for Elastic SIEM/Security, covering endpoint, network, and cloud log sources.
→ opsec12/ElasticKQL
